Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 22 

ADMTG_PRVDR_NPI 

LABEL: Admitting Provider NPI 

DESCRIPTION: The National Provider ID (NPI) of the doctor responsible for admitting a patient to a hospital or other 
inpatient health facility. 

SHORT NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_NPI 

LONG NAME: ADMTG_PRVDR_NPI 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES:
